title: astragalus bazarganii
intro: Astragalus bazarganii, also known as the Bazargan milkvetch, is a species of plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This perennial herb is native to Iran and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus bazarganii include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and aid in the prevention of diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disorders. Astragalus bazarganii is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
